Sal Priadi - Ada titik-titik di ujung doa (Official Music Video)
Subscribe Sal Priadi: http://smarturl.it/SubscribeSalPriadi

Video Musik Ada Titik-Titik di Ujung Doa merupakan video musik resmi keempat dari album MASPF—menyusul “Semua Lagu Cinta”, “Dari Planet Lain”, dan “Gala Bunga Matahari”. 

Perilisan Video Musik Ada Titik-Titik di Ujung Doa tidak semata-mata menamatkan perjalanan. Karya ini justru disiapkan sebagai titik penyambung menuju fase kreatif berikutnya.

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Subscribe and press (🔔) to join the Notification Squad and stay updated with new uploads

Download Stream - https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Follow Bruno Mars:
https://instagram.com/brunomars
https://facebook.com/brunomars
https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
For just the chance to win your heart
You could set the bar beyond the stars
I'll do anything, anything you ask me to

[Pre-Chorus]
Say you want the moon
Watch me learn to fly
Ain't no mountain you could point to
I wouldn't climb

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

[Verse 2]
To hold your hand and call you mine
I'm tryna be your man 'til the end of time
Oh, I'll do anything, anything you ask me to

[Pre-Chorus]
I would run through a fire
Just to be by your side
If your heart's on the line
You could take mine

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

[Bridge]
I would swim across the sea just to show you
Sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on
To prove that you belong here in my arms

[Pre-Chorus]
Say you want the moon
Watch me learn to fly
Ain't no mountain you could point to
I wouldn't climb

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

Kare marajeh rassa taresna
(Sudah memperbesar rasa cintaku)
Arebbhen bhule e pa bhunga'a
(Berharap engkau membahagiakanku)

Loka se lambhe' sangghu la mare
(Luka yang dulu ku kira sudah sembuh)
Ngennesse abhek sakek dukaleh
(Sedih ternyata dibikin sakit yang kedua kalinya)

Mangken bule nyingghe'e
(Sudah saatnya aku pergi)
Ateh bhule pon jerreh
(Hatiku sudah trauma)

Tak koat rasssana e ka ghile
(Tidak kuat rasanya kayak orang gila)

Sawat kowatteh ateh naremah 
(Sekuat kuatnya hatiku menerima)
Paggun tak bisa nahan sakek nah 
(Tetap tidak bisa menahan sakitnya)

Saranah lokah se etaremah 
(Rasa luka yang ku terima)
Rassah taresnah tadhek argenah 
(Rassa cintaku tidak ada harganya)
Taseksah
(Tersiksa)

snippet.title: P1Harmony (피원하모니) - ‘UNIQUE’ MV
snippet.description:
P1Harmony (피원하모니) - ‘UNIQUE’ MV

[Apple Music] : https://music.apple.com/us/album/unique-ep/1878335259
[Melon] : https://www.melon.com/album/detail.htm?albumId=12914348
[Spotify] : https://open.spotify.com/album/71EVZx82GopCyTNRZVkZSk

그룹 P1Harmony (피원하모니)가 아홉 번째 미니 앨범 ‘UNIQUE’로 컴백했다. 

미니 9집 ‘UNIQUE’는 파업을 선언했던 HERO 피원하모니가 다시 영웅으로 복귀하기까지의 여정을 그린 앨범이다. 결국 영웅일 수밖에 없는 운명을 지닌 피원하모니는 고민과 선택의 과정을 거치며 성장하고, 또 성숙해진다. 신보에는 스스로가 영웅임을 받아들이며 성장해 나가는 HERO 피원하모니의 서사가 담겼다. 

동명의 타이틀곡 ‘UNIQUE’는 Brazilian Funk 특유의 강렬한 사운드와 묵직한 드럼 비트가 돋보이는 곡이다. 컨셉추얼한 트랙과 중독적인 후렴구는 Crew에 대한 넘치는 자신감을 여과 없이 보여 주며, 함께하는 것만으로 무엇도 두려울 것이 없다는 단단한 유대의 메시지를 담은 가사를 통해 P1Harmony만의 역동적인 에너지를 전한다. 

이 곡의 에너지와 메시지는 퍼포먼스를 통해 더욱 입체적으로 확장된다. Brazilian Funk 특유의 그루브 위에 피원하모니만의 개성이 어우러진 퍼포먼스는, 핸드 사인으로 시작되는 인트로부터 몰입도를 끌어올린다. 또한 아프로 댄스를 기반으로 한 안무는 파워풀하면서도 절제된 무드로 곡의 매력을 극대화한다. 특히 후렴구 ‘My crew UNIQUE’ 파트에서는 멤버들이 직접 참여한 동작과 개성 있는 제스처가 더해져, 피원하모니만의 독보적인 색을 또렷하게 드러낸다.

‘UNIQUE’ 뮤직비디오는 운명을 받아들이고 각성하는 피원하모니의 모습을 중심으로 그려진다. 영웅의 귀환을 주제로 다루지만, 정의감 넘치는 이미지가 아닌 피원하모니가 재해석한 영웅상을 제시하며 이들의 유니크함을 각인시킨다. 각성의 순간을 초월적인 비주얼로 풀어내며, 피원하모니만의 영웅 서사를 완성한다. 

신보에는 타이틀곡 외에도 업 비트 일렉트로닉 댄스곡 ‘Pandemonium’, 피원하모니의 귀여운 플러팅을 담은 가사가 어우러진 ‘L.O.Y.L.’, 풍부한 보컬 하모니가 깊은 인상을 주는 ‘Wednesday Girl’, 피원하모니의 당당한 태도를 엿볼 수 있는 힙합 댄스곡 ‘Triple 7’, 그룹의 존재감을 거침없이 드러내는 힙합 장르의 곡 ‘ICE (VVS)’까지 총 6곡이 수록됐다. 

이번 앨범에서도 피원하모니는 전곡 크레딧에 이름을 올리며 자신들만의 음악 세계를 구축한다. 인탁과 종섭은 타이틀곡을 포함한 전곡 작사에 참여했고, 기호와 지웅 역시 작사에 힘을 보태며 그룹 고유의 정체성을 완성했다.

피원하모니는 늘 새로운 음악과 새로운 무대를 향해 나아간다. 그리고 그 중심에는 언제나 ‘피원하모니다워야 한다’는 확고한 다짐이 있다. 매 앨범 자신들만의 색을 또렷하게 확장해 온 피원하모니. 미니 9집 ‘UNIQUE’는 말 그대로 유니크한 지금의 피원하모니를 가장 선명하게 보여 주는 앨범이 될 것이다.

P1Harmony has returned with their ninth mini album “UNIQUE.” 

The ninth mini album “UNIQUE” followsthe journey of HERO P1Harmony, who had declared a strike, as they return to their roles as heroes. Bound by a destiny that calls them to heroism, P1Harmony grows and matures through moments of reflection and choice. The new album captures the narrative of HERO P1Harmony embracing their identity as heroes and evolving along the way. 

The title track “UNIQUE” features the intense sound of Brazilian Funk driven by powerful drum beats. The conceptual track and addictive chorus confidently showcase their overflowing pride in their Crew, while the lyrics deliver a message of an unbreakable bond; together, there is nothing to fear. The track encapsulates P1Harmony’s dynamic energy. 

The energy and message of this track are further elevated through performance. The performance, which blends P1Harmony’s unique style with the distinctive groove of Brazilian Funk, draws audiences in from the very first moment with a hand-sign introduction. The choreography, rooted in Afro dance, maximizes the song's appeal with its powerful yet controlled mood. The “My crew UNIQUE” chorus line especially stands out, featuring member-created movements and distinctive gestures that clearly showcase P1Harmony’s unmistakable identity.

The “UNIQUE” music video portrays P1Harmony as they awaken to and embrace their destiny. With the story of hero’s return, the video presents P1Harmony’s reinterpretation of what a hero looks like rather than a typical justice-driven image, leaving a lasting impression of their uniqueness. The moment of awakening is expressed through transcendent visuals, completing P1Harmony’s hero narrative. 

In addition to the title track, the new album includes six songs in total: the upbeat electronic dance track “Pandemonium”; “L.O.Y.L.,” featuring lyrics that capture P1Harmony’s playful flirting; “Wednesday Girl,” highlighted by rich vocal harmonies; the hip-hop dance track “Triple 7,” showcasing P1Harmony’s confident attitude; and the hip-hop track “ICE (VVS),” which boldly displays the group’s commanding presence. 

P1Harmony is credited across every track, building their own musical universe. INTAK and JONGSEOB wrote lyrics for all songs, including the title track, while KEEHO and JIUNG also contributed to completing the group’s distinct identity. 

P1Harmony continues to move toward, embracing new music and new stages. At the core of their journey lies an unwavering commitment staying in harmony with who they are as P1Harmony.  Having consistently expanded their musical identity with each album, P1Harmony’s ninth mini album “UNIQUE” stands as the album that most vividly captures P1Harmony’s true identity of today.

I'm wide awake

Wouldn't dive in, wouldn't bow down

[Interlude]
I'm wide awake
I'm wide awake

[Chorus]

snippet.title: HUH?! Maling Brainrot Tapi Dijaga Knockout Penguin 🐧🔥🐧 | Escape Knockout for Brainrots Indonesia
snippet.description:
HUH?! Maling Brainrot Tapi Dijaga Knockout Penguin 🐧🔥🐧 | Escape Knockout for Brainrots Indonesia

Nama Game : Escape Knockout for Brainrots
Link Game : https://www.roblox.com/games/81859790878410

🔰 Sekarang kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat VOICE di Room Santuy yang ada di Discord. Jadwal ga tentu, tapi biasanya kalau sore sekitar jam 15.30 - 16.30 WIB. Baca lagi bagian bawah biar kalian benar-benar mengerti 🗿

Sebelum JOIN, tolong baca ini ya 🙏😁
✅ Izin sama orang tua & tanya boleh ga install dan main Discord? Btw, discord punya aturan kalau mau buat akun mesti umur 13+
✅ PENTING!! Ikut MABAR atau RECORD mungkin agak susah karena ramai yang tungguin bang Hayo, sedangkan game Roblox server-nya terbatas
✅ Record juga GA SELALU MABAR  karena beberapa game ga boleh rusuh & mesti diatur sebaik mungkin
✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya
✅ Kadang bang Hayo harus pakai LINK PRIVATE SERVER biar record-nya lebih lancar. Kirim link-nya di Discord & untuk cara JOIN baca di cara-ikut-record yang ada di Discord
✅ Baca PERATURAN GROUP & PERTANYAAN UMUM  di Discord untuk kepentingan bersama
✅ Di group ini kalian juga bisa mencari KAWAN yang mungkin cocok sama kalian dan bisa main bareng. Ga perlu fokus sama bang Hayo saja karena bang Hayo ga mampu standby 24 jam
✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

🔰 Bang, kenapa ga bisa chat di Discord?
Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

🔰 Bang, CARA JOIN gimana ya?
Bang Hayo sudah jelasin secara lengkap di Discord. Cari saja di channel cara-ikut-record biar kalian paham. Lalu, akun yang umurnya kurang dari 13 tahun akan agak sulit buat join karena peraturan terbaru Roblox

Nickname: HaYo_Go
Group Roblox: https://bit.ly/2PlVv2J a.k.a HaYoGo Team 
Join Discord: https://discord.gg/V7susGp

Game Roblox terbaru & Game Roblox terbaik
